items.prompt: Triage the inbox for this week's release, identify the items that must be handled today, and draft a concise status email.
Summarize this batch of interview feedback into a one-page hiring conclusion with recommend, hold, and reject groups.
Use product, engineering, and operations inputs to write a cross-team handoff note that lets the next shift resume immediately.
Turn a messy batch of customer post-meeting notes into a CRM-ready structured summary.
Build a simple production allocation model and return the optimal product mix under capacity and material constraints.
Optimize advertising budget allocation using historical ROI and diminishing marginal return.
Build a risk prioritization score from multiple risk factors and rank the cases.
Compute the break-even point for the project from cost, price, and fixed overhead inputs.
Implement a solver for the eight queens problem.
Repair a work queue with concurrency or ordering bugs that cause dropped or duplicated results.
Implement a reasonably complete NumPy-style cross attention function.
Write a simple data cleaning pipeline that handles missing values, duplicates, and basic normalization.
Extract and recover readable text from a provided OCR-style source document.
Write a script that converts Markdown into structured JSON.
Audit a sample of labeled training data and flag inconsistent or ambiguous annotations.
Reconstruct a clear timeline from the raw event records in the directory.
Merge multiple document fragments into one final README.
Repair a startup failure using the provided code and configuration files.
Implement a Python FIFO queue.
Parse ten paper entries and extract structured metadata such as title, authors, and abstract.
Create a command-line parser in Python using argparse.
Clean a noisy dataset and then perform a linear fit.
Merge multiple CSV files for customers, orders, and products and compute the required analytics.
Resolve overlapping and conflicting dependencies across two Python requirements files.
Convert a nested JSON web application config into YAML and save the output as config.yaml.
Extract the structure of each HTML form from a static form.html file.
Analyze a simulated ps aux output stored in workspace/processes.txt.
Extract every hyperlink from a static HTML file and classify each link.
Create a recurring meeting plan with complete scheduling and agenda details.
Analyze one week of email JSON records and produce a structured sender-grouped weekly summary with urgency highlights.
